infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ogwu uses your location to find hospitals and care providers near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ogwu uses your camera to capture documents, lab results, and prescriptions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ogwu accesses your photo library to upload documents and medical images.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Ogwu adds your appointments to Apple Calendar so you don't miss them.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: Ogwu sends you a notification when a provider replies to your consult.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Ogwu uses your location to find hospitals and care providers near you.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow Ogwu to add your appointment to Apple Calendar.
